sections.paragraph:
Original: אפוא אפו

Transliteration: 'êphô 'êphô'

Phonetic: ay-fo'

BDB Definition:

  1. then, now, so
    1. (who) then, (what) then (with interrogative)
    2. then (with imperative - i.e. know then)
    3. if...then (with adverb)

Origin: from H6311

TWOT entry: 144

Part(s) of speech:
